channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes  CNN
  2. Trump Says Iran War Could Last Weeks and Gives Competing Visions of New Regime  The New York Times
  3. U.S. won’t rule out sending ground troops into Iran  The Washington Post
  4. Trump takes unconventional approach to communicating to the public about its war in Iran  Yahoo
  5. As Mideast conflict widens, US says attacks on Iran will last weeks and intensify  AP News

item.title: Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter - AP News
item.description:
1. Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter  AP News
  2. Iran Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran, Beirut in Widening Conflict  WSJ
  3. Top member of Iran’s Quds Force killed in Navy strike in Beirut yesterday, IDF says  The Times of Israel
  4. Israeli military deploys additional forces to southern Lebanon  Yahoo
  5. Israel strikes Lebanon’s Beirut again; Hezbollah launches drones at Israel  Al Jazeera

item.description:
1. UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp  Bloomberg.com

item.description:
1. US Embassy in Riyadh hit by drones amid Iran fallout, Saudi officials say  Axios

item.title: State Department urges U.S. citizens to leave more than a dozen Middle Eastern countries - PBS
item.description:
1. State Department urges U.S. citizens to leave more than a dozen Middle Eastern countries  PBS

  5. State Department urges Americans across Mideast to depart as strikes continue  NBC News

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters
item.description:
1. About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says  Reuters

  4. Iran conflict disrupts global shipping as tankers are stranded, damaged  Reuters
  5. Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf as Iran conflict disrupts shipping  The Guardian

item.title: Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky to avoid closed airspace - Business Insider
item.description:
1. Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky to avoid closed airspace  Business Insider

  4. Thousands of flights cancelled as world faces worst travel chaos since Covid crisis  The Guardian

item.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies - BBC
item.description:
1. France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies  BBC

  3. Macron Expands French Nuclear Arsenal and Vows Protection for Neighbors  The New York Times
  4. France to increase nuclear arsenal and European weapons cooperation, Macron says  The Guardian
  5. France Floats Nuclear Deployment Across Europe  WSJ

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations  The New York Times
  2. 'I saw missiles being intercepted': Influencers tell of shock as Iran hits Dubai's luxury landmarks  BBC
  3. I'm raising 2 kids in Abu Dhabi. I'm not panicking — but I feel powerless.  Yahoo
  4. I flew to Dubai for my 30th birthday. Now I'm stranded 8,000 miles from home and terrified after the US strikes on Iran.  Business Insider
  5. They flew to Dubai for a romantic anniversary getaway. Then the bombing started.  NBC News

item.title: China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran - The Economist
item.description:
1. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  2. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian
  3. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  4. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  5. China could face ‘real problems’ within two months if Strait of Hormuz crisis drags on, expert warns  Fox Business

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News

  4. 6 U.S. soldiers have been killed as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
  5. Six Troops Killed in Kuwait in Iran Drone Attack  WSJ

item.title: World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war - PBS
item.description:
1. World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war  PBS
  2. France ready to ‘take part’ in defense of Gulf countries and Jordan against Iran  The Times of Israel
  3. Macron says US and Israeli strikes on Iran have led to 'an unprecedented regional escalation'  Yahoo
